text_block_list.text: ...Something's off, though. Like, it just doesn't feel right.
choice_data_list: Even so, this win is yours.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I won with my own skill.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Before, I would've been all like "Hah! In your face!" but I don't feel that anymore. I am glad I was able to run well though...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I hate this awkward feeling.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I guess I'll just say I'm "happy" and call it a day.
